name: torotic-cad
description: Parametric 3D CAD in the browser (SolidWorks-style sketch + feature modeling)

scripts.test: tsx src/sketch/mirrorSketch.test.ts && tsx src/sketch/pointOnLine.test.ts && tsx src/sketch/arcSlot.runtime.test.ts && tsx src/kernel/mirror.runtime.test.ts && tsx src/ai/aiDesign.runtime.test.ts && tsx src/kernel/rebuild.runtime.test.ts && tsx src/kernel/profile.runtime.test.ts && tsx src/kernel/thread.runtime.test.ts
